prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次为约11265名→14972名→21823名→15116名→9394名。2023年位次大幅后移后，2024年明显回升，2025年进一步大幅前移至 9394名，近两年累计前移约12429名，2025年基准位次约9394名；该校在内蒙古理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年35人、2022年35人、2023年35人、2024年33人 、2025年33人；2026年计划28人，较2025年缩招约15.2%，缩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南昌大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；2026年软科中 国大学主榜排名第74位，近年排名稳定在69–78位区间，属于中上游211院校；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏正面（男排夺冠等正面事件3件，负面2件）；抖音热 度为较热（总排名第43位，综合热度约96.6万），男排夺冠话题带来额外曝光，报考关注度有所升温。未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中食品科学与工 程获评A+，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工程、食品营养与健康直接对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息 /通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学推荐热度稳定；土木建筑分化观望，新闻传播明显劝退。内蒙古2026年高考总人数约15.4万人（较2025年 增长约32%），物理类考生估算约11.08万人，考生规模大幅增加，竞争加剧；南昌大学位于江西省，在内蒙古自治区为非 本省招生，无本地倾斜；该校在全国各省招生分布较均衡，内蒙古招生占比约0.3%左右，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势走势、2026年招生 计划缩招约15.2%（缓和竞争）、内蒙古考生总数大幅增长约32%（加剧竞争）以及声誉热度偏正面等因素，缩招效应与考生增长效应基本对冲，声誉热度略推高竞争。，考虑考生规模激增和声誉升温，小幅上调50名；预测2026年理科（物理类）最低位次约8590名，区间8090–9090名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 11265 → 14972 → 21823 → 15116 → 9394. After a significant drop in 2023, rankings rebounded in 2024 and further advanced to 9394 in 2025, with a cumulative advance of about 12429 positions over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 9394. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Inner Mongolia: 35 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 33 in 2024, 33 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 28, a reduction of about 15.2% compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks 74th, with recent rankings stable in the 69–78 range, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive (3 positive events such as the men's volleyball championship, 2 negative events). On Douyin, it is relatively hot (overall ranking 43rd, comprehensive heat about 966,000), with the men's volleyball championship topic bringing additional exposure, leading to increased application attention. No significant gaps in admission records have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering was rated A+, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the majors of Food Science and Engineering and Food Nutrition and Health in the enrollment plan, providing strong appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other majors continue to be highly recommended; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain stable recommendation popularity; Civil Engineering and Architecture are in a wait-and-see state with divergence; Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000 (an increase of about 32% compared to 2025), with an estimated 110,800 physics category examinees, significantly increasing competition. Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province, and in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region, it is not a local enrollment, so there is no local preference. The university's enrollment distribution across provinces is relatively balanced, with Inner Mongolia accounting for about 0.3% of total enrollment, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend in rankings in 2025, the enrollment plan reduction of about 15.2% in 2026 (easing competition), the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of examinees in Inner Mongolia (intensifying competition), and the slightly positive reputation and heat, the reduction effect and examinee growth effect largely offset each other, while reputation and heat slightly increase competition. Taking into account the surge in examinee numbers and the warming reputation, a small upward adjustment of 50 positions is made; the predicted minimum ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 is approximately 8590, with a range of 8090–9090.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 8590, with a range of 8090–9090. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (≤8090), prioritize reaching for top-tier majors like Clinical Medicine and Electrical Engineering. For rankings near the upper limit (≥9090), mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors, with Tier 2 as a stable option. Although Food Science and Engineering (A+ discipline) is placed in Tier 2, its strong disciplinary strength deserves special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 4537 → 4690 → 4384 → 2757 → 2713. Rankings fluctuated between 4400–4700 from 2021 to 2023, then significantly advanced to 2757 in 2024, and further slightly advanced to 2713 in 2025, with a cumulative advance of about 1671 positions over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2713. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Inner Mongolia: 10 students in 2021, 10 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 12 in 2024, 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 9 students, a 25% reduction compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction, theoretically easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In 2026, it ranks 74th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive. On Douyin, it is relatively hot (43rd overall), with topics such as the men's volleyball team winning the championship increasing the school's exposure, leading to a rise in application attention. No obvious enrollment gaps have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering received an A+, but the liberal arts enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, English, Tourism Management, etc.) are not directly related to this discipline, so the pulling effect of the advantageous discipline on liberal arts major applications is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Chinese major recommendation popularity is relatively hot, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, and foreign languages are generally wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination takers in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, with history category candidates estimated at about 43,200 (an increase of about 32.5% from 32,600 in 2025), leading to a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province and is not a local enrollment university in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region. The number of liberal arts students enrolled in Inner Mongolia is small (9–12), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend in rankings from 2024 to 2025, the 25% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (easing competition), the significant increase of about 32.5% in the total number of history category candidates in Inner Mongolia (intensifying competition), and the slightly positive reputation and heat, the reduction effect and candidate growth effect largely offset each other, with reputation and heat slightly increasing competition. Taking into account the surge in candidate scale and rising reputation, a slight upward adjustment of 30 positions is made; the predicted minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) in 2026 is approximately 2336, with a range of 1916–2756.
